productDisplayName: Clarks Women Black Dolphin Cove Heels
description: For the subtle stamp of sophistication in your ensemble, this pair of heels from clarks are the best bet. Styled in understated tones, classic cuts and a surprising rivet and buckle embellishment on the front, this shoe nails all of this season's hottest trends. Wear this with dressy ensembles for a roguish touch of the Texas cowgirl. Heels: 3" Upper Leather upper with no fussy overlays Soft fabric lining Padded synthetic leather sockliner for instep comfort Outsole TPU outsole with gooves on the heel and forefoot Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
